name: Double Kiss Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wrappers from candies; set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Line muffin cups with 2-1/2 inch papers.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter and sugar. Beat on high speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes.
5. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, salt, and baking powder; add alternately with water to the butter mixture. Mix just until combined.
6. Fill prepared muffin cups about 1/2 full with batter.
7. Place a chocolate kiss in the center of each cupcake.
8. Bake for 20 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
10. Frost as desired, then place another kiss on top of each cupcake.
